summary: Pod Hero Card Feature Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Pod Hero Card replaces old ActiveIssueBanner and shows the most important action at the top of the Support Pod page. Collapsible sections (Recruiting Intelligence, Intervention Playbook, Recruiting Timeline, Treatment History) are collapsed by default. CTA buttons trigger appropriate actions. Backend 14/14 tests passed, Frontend UI fully functional.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed actions created during backend API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pod Hero Card tested on /support-pods/{athlete_id}. Key data-testid selectors: pod-hero-card, pod-hero-action, pod-hero-explanation, pod-hero-cta, pod-hero-escalate. Collapsible section toggles: section-recruiting-intelligence-toggle, section-intervention-playbook-toggle, section-recruiting-timeline-toggle, section-treatment-history-toggle. Layout order verified: 1. Pod Hero Card (y=145), 2. Next Actions (y=365.75), 3. Athlete Snapshot/Support Team, 4-7. Collapsible sections. Old ActiveIssueBanner component file exists but is NOT imported in SupportPod.js.

test_classes: TestPodHeroCardAPI - pod_top_action field returned, athlete_3 critical urgency, correct top_action/explanation, athlete_1/5 testing, priority ordering, issue_type populated
TestLayoutOrderAPI - all layout sections data present, recruiting_signals has content, recruiting_timeline has milestones, intervention_playbook present
TestNextActionsStillWorks - create action, complete action, pod_members for assignment

pod_hero_card_visible.details: Pod Hero Card visible at top with data-testid='pod-hero-card'

urgency_badge_critical.details: athlete_3 shows CRITICAL urgency badge (red) with pulsing indicator

issue_type_displayed.details: Shows 'No activity in 33 days' for athlete_3

top_action_displayed.details: Shows 'Check In With Athlete' with data-testid='pod-hero-action'

explanation_displayed.details: Shows 'Athlete has gone dark — 33 days without activity. Immediate check-in needed' with data-testid='pod-hero-explanation'

owner_badge.details: Shows 'Coach' owner badge on right side

cta_button.details: CTA button with data-testid='pod-hero-cta' shows 'Log Check-In' for momentum_drop

escalate_button_critical.details: Escalate button visible for critical urgency with data-testid='pod-hero-escalate'

cta_triggers_action.details: Clicking 'Log Check-In' opens Send Message modal (CoachEmailComposer)

hero_card_adapts_athlete_1.details: athlete_1 (Sarah Martinez): Critical, 'No activity in 30 days', 'Check In With Athlete', 'Log Check-In'

hero_card_adapts_athlete_5.details: athlete_5 (Olivia Anderson): Critical, 'Active blocker', 'Remove Blocker', 'Resolve Blocker' - blocker has highest priority

layout_order_verified.details: 1. Pod Hero Card (y=145), 2. Next Actions (y=365.75), 3. Athlete Snapshot + Support Team, 4. Recruiting Intelligence (collapsed), 5. Intervention Playbook (collapsed), 6. Recruiting Timeline (collapsed), 7. Treatment History (collapsed)

collapsible_sections_collapsed_by_defaul.details: All 4 collapsible sections found with toggle buttons, collapsed by default

collapsible_sections_expandable.details: Clicking toggle expands section (Treatment History content: 2218 chars after expand)

old_active_issue_banner_removed.details: ActiveIssueBanner NOT imported in SupportPod.js - replaced by PodHeroCard

api_verification.GET_support_pods_athlete_3: 200 OK - returns pod_top_action with all 11 fields
